description_long: This is a compact, cylindrical plastic bottle with a deep blue color and a matching blue cap. The front features a prominent 'Babar' logo with a stylized elephant graphic and a pink label strip near the base. The back displays a barcode, product information, and additional branding in smaller text. The bottle has a smooth, slightly matte finish and appears to be made of lightweight plastic, typical for single-use bottled water. The cap is round, flat-topped, and likely a screw-on type, matching the bottle's color. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, suitable for urban retail environments.
description: A small, blue plastic bottled water with a matching blue screw cap and prominent 'Babar' branding on the front. The bottle has a smooth, matte finish and a compact, cylindrical shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Babar' logo, elephant graphic, and a pink label strip at the bottom.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a barcode, product information, and a green label area.
description_view_2: Side view with blue text and branding, no barcode or pink label visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more product information and a small pink and blue graphic at the base.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Babar' in large blue letters with a stylized elephant logo above, and a pink strip with white text at the bottom. Back and sides have smaller blue and green text, a barcode, and product information. Branding is clear, modern, and visually prominent.
attribute_cap_type: Screw cap; round, flat-topped, solid blue color, no visible ridges or tamper-evident features.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the bottle material is not see-through, with a solid blue color and no visible transparency or gradients.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, cylindrical neck with no visible ridges or flares; smooth transition to the cap, typical of standard screw-top bottles.
